title: First fully-exploded Master_Package tree; Baltic Grey Zone materials
public_claim: Red Team proper archive is a fully exploded Master Package tree with Baltic Grey Zone materials.
distinctive_mechanism: It separates registry, canon, workspace, current implementation state, live repo snapshots, dual-form evidence, integration patch kit, and exports so the archive can support both source truth and future implementation.
use_value: It matters because it preserves the difference between source evidence, current repo state, and proposed Red Team Lab integration.
